Functions.Name: IsHeadMountedDisplayEnabled
Functions.Description: Returns whether or not we are currently using the head mounted display.

Functions.Name: IsHeadMountedDisplayConnected
Functions.Description: Returns whether or not the HMD hardware is connected and ready to use.  It may or may not actually be in use.

Return.Description: (Boolean)  status whether the HMD hardware is connected and ready to use.  It may or may not actually be in use.

Functions.Name: EnableHMD
Functions.Description: Switches tofrom using HMD and stereo rendering.

Params.Name: bEnable
Params.Description: (in) 'true' to enable HMD stereo; 'false' otherwise

Return.Description: (Boolean)		True, if the request was successful.

Functions.Name: GetHMDDeviceName
Functions.Description: Returns the name of the device, so scripts can modify their behaviour appropriately

Return.Description: FName specific to the currently active HMD device type.  "None" implies no device, "Unknown" implies a device with no description.

Functions.Name: GetHMDWornState
Functions.Description: Returns the worn state of the device.

Return.Description: Unknown, Worn, NotWorn.  If the platform does not detect this it will always return Unknown.

Functions.Name: GetOrientationAndPosition
Functions.Description: Grabs the current orientation and position for the HMD.  If positional tracking is not available, DevicePosition will be a zero vector

Params.Name: DeviceRotation
Params.Description: (out) The device's current rotation

Params.Name: DevicePosition
Params.Description: (out) The device's current position, in its own tracking space

Functions.Name: HasValidTrackingPosition
Functions.Description: If the HMD supports positional tracking, whether or not we are currently being tracked

Functions.Name: GetNumOfTrackingSensors
Functions.Description: If the HMD has multiple positional tracking sensors, return a total number of them currently connected.

Functions.Name: GetTrackingSensorParameters
Functions.Description:
If the HMD has a positional sensor, this will return the game-world location of it, as well as the parameters for the bounding region of tracking.
	  This allows an in-game representation of the legal positional tracking range.  All values will be zeroed if the sensor is not available or the HMD does not support it.

Params.Name: Origin
Params.Description: (out) Origin, in world-space, of the sensor

Params.Name: Rotation
Params.Description: (out) Rotation, in world-space, of the sensor

Params.Name: LeftFOV
Params.Description: (out) Field-of-view, left from center, in degrees, of the valid tracking zone of the sensor

Params.Name: RightFOV
Params.Description: (out) Field-of-view, right from center, in degrees, of the valid tracking zone of the sensor

Params.Name: TopFOV
Params.Description: (out) Field-of-view, top from center, in degrees, of the valid tracking zone of the sensor

Params.Name: BottomFOV
Params.Description: (out) Field-of-view, bottom from center, in degrees, of the valid tracking zone of the sensor

Params.Name: Distance
Params.Description: (out) Nominal distance to sensor, in world-space

Params.Name: NearPlane
Params.Description: (out) Near plane distance of the tracking volume, in world-space

Params.Name: FarPlane
Params.Description: (out) Far plane distance of the tracking volume, in world-space

Params.Name: IsActive
Params.Description: (out) True, if the query for the specified sensor succeeded.

Params.Name: Index
Params.Description: (in) Index of the tracking sensor to query

Functions.Name: GetPositionalTrackingCameraParameters
Functions.Description:
If the HMD has a positional sensor, this will return the game-world location of it, as well as the parameters for the bounding region of tracking.
	  This allows an in-game representation of the legal positional tracking range.  All values will be zeroed if the sensor is not available or the HMD does not support it.

Params.Name: HFOV
Params.Description: (out) Field-of-view, horizontal, in degrees, of the valid tracking zone of the sensor

Params.Name: VFOV
Params.Description: (out) Field-of-view, vertical, in degrees, of the valid tracking zone of the sensor

Params.Name: CameraDistance
Params.Description: (out) Nominal distance to sensor, in world-space

Params.Name: NearPlane
Params.Description: (out) Near plane distance of the tracking volume, in world-space

Params.Name: FarPlane
Params.Description: (out) Far plane distance of the tracking volume, in world-space

Functions.Name: IsInLowPersistenceMode
Functions.Description: Returns true, if HMD is in low persistence mode. 'false' otherwise.

Functions.Name: EnableLowPersistenceMode
Functions.Description: Switches between low and full persistence modes.

Params.Name: bEnable
Params.Description: (in) 'true' to enable low persistence mode; 'false' otherwise

Functions.Name: ResetOrientationAndPosition
Functions.Description:
Resets orientation by setting roll and pitch to 0, assuming that current yaw is forward direction and assuming
	  current position as a 'zero-point' (for positional tracking).

Params.Name: Yaw
Params.Description: (in) the desired yaw to be set after orientation reset.

Params.Name: Options
Params.Description: (in) specifies either position, orientation or both should be reset.

Functions.Name: SetClippingPlanes
Functions.Description:
Sets near and far clipping planes (NCP and FCP) for stereo rendering. Similar to 'stereo ncp= fcp' console command, but NCP and FCP set by this
	  call won't be saved in .ini file.

Params.Name: Near
Params.Description: (in) Near clipping plane, in centimeters

Params.Name: Far
Params.Description: (in) Far clipping plane, in centimeters

Functions.Name: GetScreenPercentage
Functions.Description: Returns screen percentage to be used in VR mode.

Return.Description: (float)	The screen percentage to be used in VR mode.

Functions.Name: SetWorldToMetersScale
Functions.Description: Sets the World to Meters scale, which changes the scale of the world as perceived by the player

Params.Name: NewScale
Params.Description: Specifies how many Unreal units correspond to one meter in the real world

Functions.Name: GetWorldToMetersScale
Functions.Description: Returns the World to Meters scale, which corresponds to the scale of the world as perceived by the player

Return.Description: How many Unreal units correspond to one meter in the real world

Functions.Name: SetTrackingOrigin
Functions.Description: Sets current tracking origin type (eye level or floor level).

Functions.Name: GetTrackingOrigin
Functions.Description: Returns current tracking origin type (eye level or floor level).

Functions.Name: GetVRFocusState
Functions.Description: Returns current state of VR focus.

Params.Name: bUseFocus
Params.Description: (out) if set to true, then this App does use VR focus.

Params.Name: bHasFocus
Params.Description: (out) if set to true, then this App currently has VR focus.

Functions.Name: IsSpectatorScreenModeControllable
Functions.Description: Return true if spectator screen mode control is available.

Functions.Name: SetSpectatorScreenMode
Functions.Description: Sets the social screen mode.

Params.Name: Mode
Params.Description: (in) The social screen Mode.

Functions.Name: SetSpectatorScreenTexture
Functions.Description: Change the texture displayed on the social screen

Functions.Name: SetSpectatorScreenModeTexturePlusEyeLayout
Functions.Description: Setup the layout for ESpectatorScreenMode::TexturePlusEye.
